prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为约28109名、55587名、24444名、17519名、50521名，走势波动较大。2022年因，2023–2024年 明显回升，2025年因考试模式改为物理类且选科要求细化，位次再次后移至50521名，近两年波动幅度超3万名，基准位次取2025年约50521名；该校在河南省理 科组招生计划：2021年46人、2022年46人、2023年50人、2024年49人、2025年（物理类）54人；2026年物理类计划增至57人，较2025年扩招约5.6%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争 格局影响中性偏松。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第60名，近年排名稳定在55–67名区间，属于医药类院校中唯一的 211，层次定位清晰，对考生有稳定吸引力；该校在2026年声誉评价文件中未出现，说明无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第78位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光 量中等偏低，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；近年无投档断档记录，报考心理预期平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业在2 024–2026年专业热度分析中持续处于"高热推荐"/"推荐"级别，报考意愿旺盛；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万，较2025年（历史类+物理类约90.7万）大幅增长约32%，按历 史比例估算物理类考生约73.4万，竞争基数显著扩大，推高录取位次。；天津医科大学位于天津市，属直辖市，对河南省考 生而言属于跨省报考，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次50521名、2026年物理类计划小幅 扩招5.6%、河南省考生总数大幅增长约32%导致竞争加剧，以及医学类专业持续高热吸引更多高分考生报考，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约5 2505名，区间52005–53005名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 28,109, 55,587, 24,444, 17,519, and 50,521 respectively, showing significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to [unspecified reasons], rankings dropped; from 2023 to 2024, they rebounded noticeably; in 2025, due to the change in exam format to Physics Category and more detailed subject requirements, rankings shifted back to 50,521. The fluctuation range over the past two years exceeds 30,000 places, with the baseline ranking taken as approximately 50,521 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Henan Province: 46 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 54 in 2025 (Physics Category); in 2026, the Physics Category plan increases to 57, an expansion of about 5.6% compared to 2025, which is limited and has a neutral to slightly loose impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list, with stable rankings in the 55–67 range in recent years. It is the only 211 university among medical institutions, with a clear hierarchical positioning that provides stable appeal to candidates. The university did not appear in the 2026 reputation evaluation documents, indicating no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 78th overall, rated as 'average,' with moderately low short video exposure and no signs of abnormal surge in application attention. There have been no records of enrollment gaps in recent years, and the application psychology is expected to be stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have consistently been rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, indicating strong application willingness. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000 for History and Physics categories). Based on historical proportions, it is estimated that there are about 734,000 Physics Category candidates, significantly expanding the competition base and pushing up admission rankings. Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, a municipality directly under the central government, which is a cross-province application for Henan candidates, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 50,521, the small expansion of 5.6% in the 2026 Physics Category plan, the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Henan Province leading to intensified competition, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors attracting more high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 52,505, with a range of 52,005 to 53,005.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 52,005–53,005, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Anesthesiology, Optometry and Ophthalmology, Medical Imaging, etc., which are clinically related) as the main direction. Tier 1 Clinical/Stomatology 5+3 Integrated majors can be targeted as a stretch goal (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range). Tier 3 majors such as Nursing and Biomedical Engineering can serve as safety choices. Medical majors generally have good employment prospects, but attention should be paid to physical condition restrictions such as color blindness and color weakness.
